modules.label: Login y control de acceso
permissionNotes: Gate global via proxy + erp_can_access_route().
Perfil actual via get_current_erp_user().

modules.label: Dashboard
permissionNotes: Acceso de ruta resuelto por proxy.

modules.label: Master Data / Users
permissionNotes: Server gate via ensureRouteAccessOrRedirect('/master-data/users').
Mutaciones sensibles pasan por /api/admin/users.

modules.label: Roles y permisos
permissionNotes: Server gate via ensureRouteAccessOrRedirect('/master-data/users/roles').
Masking y acceso dependen de role_resource_permissions / role_field_permissions.

modules.label: Clients
permissionNotes: Acceso por proxy + RLS de clients.
Owner visibility depende de reglas owner_only activadas en backend.

modules.label: Client detail
permissionNotes: Acceso por proxy + RLS derivado del client.
Incluye logistics parties como subflujo live del detalle.

modules.label: Contacts
permissionNotes: Acceso por proxy + RLS de contacts derivado del client.

modules.label: Opportunities
permissionNotes: Acceso por proxy + owner visibility sobre salesperson_id.

modules.label: Opportunity detail
permissionNotes: Acceso por proxy + owner visibility.
Create quotation usa create_quotation_from_opportunity().

modules.label: Quotations
permissionNotes: Listado usa search_quotations() y quotation_summary_view.
Masking economico depende de quotation_summary_view.

modules.label: Quotation detail
permissionNotes: Acceso por proxy + masking en quotation_summary_view / quotation_cost_line_secure_view.
Incluye create booking como subflujo live dependiente.

modules.label: Customer document preview y PDF
permissionNotes: Debe permanecer sincronizado con quotation_summary_view y opciones customer-facing.

modules.label: Pricing request preview y PDF
permissionNotes: Debe ocultar cliente y montos comerciales.

modules.label: Pricing / Providers
permissionNotes: Acceso por proxy + RLS de providers.

modules.label: Pricing / Provider detail
permissionNotes: Acceso por proxy + RLS de providers/provider_contacts/provider_service_offerings.

modules.label: Pricing / Quotations
permissionNotes: Usa take_quotation_for_pricing() y save_quotation_purchase_option().
Masking economico parcial por vistas seguras.

modules.label: Master Data shell
permissionNotes: Acceso por proxy.

modules.label: Service transport types
permissionNotes: CRUD via create/update/delete_service_transport_type().

modules.label: Sales accounting concepts
permissionNotes: CRUD via create/update/delete_sales_accounting_concept().

modules.label: Quotation rejection reasons
permissionNotes: CRUD via create/update/delete_quotation_rejection_reason().

modules.label: Exchange rates
permissionNotes: Server gate en ruta live + sync admin path protegido.

modules.label: UN/LOCODE lookup
permissionNotes: Canonical contract via unlocode_lookup_view + search_unlocodes().
Snapshot fallback sigue presente como rollback safety.

findings.title: Large live route component (898 LOC)
findings.body: This route deserves targeted smoke and concurrency coverage because behavior is concentrated in one client-heavy file.

findings.title: Mixed RPC workflows and direct table mutations
findings.body: This live query module mixes canonical RPC paths with direct writes, which increases drift and makes concurrency issues harder to reason about.

findings.title: Fallback or legacy branches remain in live data access
findings.body: Temporary rollback-safety logic is still present in a live module, so canonical-vs-fallback behavior needs explicit regression coverage.

findings.body: Temporary rollback-safety logic is still present in a live module, so canonical-vs-fallback behavior needs explicit regression coverage.

findings.title: Large live route component (1101 LOC)
findings.body: This route deserves targeted smoke and concurrency coverage because behavior is concentrated in one client-heavy file.

findings.title: High local state density (29 useState calls)
findings.body: The page manages enough local state to make stale UI, missed refreshes, or unnecessary rerenders more likely under heavy usage.

findings.body: This live query module mixes canonical RPC paths with direct writes, which increases drift and makes concurrency issues harder to reason about.

findings.title: Very large live route component (1567 LOC)
